summary: First "proper handoff zip" for the Glass Scriptorium — a MuranoOS room that is not a note page but a persistent narrative operating environment combining curriculum/canon, active storytelling project work, exemplar study, revision intelligence, provenance discipline, and public-safe/teaching-safe export generation.
final_use_case: It treats expression as an instrument with audience, warrant, cadence, and rhetorical-risk controls rather than as decorative prose.

instruments.instrument_name: Glass Scriptorium Data Schema And Persistence Plan
instruments.input: entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions
instruments.operation: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status.
instruments.output: data model that lets the room preserve work instead of acting like a static page

instruments.input: frontend, backend, storage, retrieval, auth, export, and portfolio linkage
instruments.operation: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. Operator reading order: ACTUAL_HANDOFF_PACK_REVIEW -> PACKAGE_PROVENANCE_GRAPH -> LIVE_REPO_ALIGNMENT -> READING_ORDER_AND_USAGE -> then Canon. Two GPT continuation prompts provided separately for design expansion vs. implementation, reflecting a clean split between doctrine work and engineering work. Wire or preserve the implementation files: No live code. Implementation work products are conceptual only: File Tree.
